news-global-econ.title: Massachusetts mayor wants nation to see positive impact of cash handouts as city tackles poverty
news-global-econ.description: Uplift Salem gave 100 residents $500 monthly for one year, backed by $685,000 in private funds. Mayor Pangallo claims a Salem State University study shows broad benefits.

news-global-econ.title: Report: Young Citizens' Happiness Plummets in High-Migration Countries
news-global-econ.description:
Mass migration has spiked stock values in English-speaking countries, but has also helped cause younger citizens' happiness to plummet, according to a new survey.

news-global-econ.title: Why some US airports are dodging TSA shutdown chaos while others grind to a halt
news-global-econ.description: Some US airports are dodging government shutdown chaos thanks to private TSA screening contractors who get paid despite the funding standoff.

news-global-econ.title: Report: 'PG&E Puppet' -- Democrat Eric Swalwell Rakes in $113K from CA Utility Co. While Vowing to Cut Rates
news-global-econ.description:
Rep. Eric Swalwell (D-CA) said he will lower energy costs if he becomes governor, but he has reportedly raked in cash from utility company PG&E.

news-global-econ.title: 'CODE RED': The Alarming Research on the Impact of ‘AI Companions’ and Widespread Loneliness
news-global-econ.description: The popularity of "AI companions" is exploding as people turn to artificial intelligence to serve as their friend or even life partner. But as Wynton Hall's new book CODE RED documents, the research on the psychological impact of AI companions is alarming — f…

news-korea-soc.title: Trump Gives Iran 48 Hours to Reopen Strait of Hormuz or U.S. Will 'Obliterate' Iran's Power Plants
news-korea-soc.description:
President Donald Trump issued an ultimatum to Iran that if the Strait of Hormuz is not opened within 48 hours, the United States will "obliterate" Iran's "various POWER PLANTS."

news-korea-soc.title: Over 20 Nations Announce Readiness to Help Open Strait of Hormuz
news-korea-soc.description:
More than 20 nations spanning from Asia to Europe to the Gulf have expressed a "readiness to contribute" to the effort of opening up the Strait of Hormuz amid threats to ships by the Islamist regime in Iran.
The post Over 20 Nations Announce Readiness to Help…

news-global-soc.title: Trump gives Iran 48-hour ultimatum to reopen Strait of Hormuz or face strikes on power plants
news-global-soc.description: Trump warns Iran it has 48 hours to fully reopen the Strait of Hormuz or the U.S. will strike and obliterate its power plants, starting with the largest.

news-global-soc.title: Trump proven right on Iran's long-range missile capability as regime targets US-UK base, experts say
news-global-soc.description: Experts say Iran's Diego Garcia missile launch exposes alleged deception about range limits, with analysts warning Europe now faces a direct ballistic threat.

news-global-soc.title: Iranian student warns 'barbaric' regime is taking nation 'hostage,' executing civilians to end unrest
news-global-soc.description: Iranian activist Mooné Rahimi claimed the regime is using executions and arrests as fear tactics, holding the nation "hostage" as global tensions rise.

news-global-soc.title: IOC addresses execution of 19-year-old Iranian wrestler Saleh Mohammadi
news-global-soc.description: The IOC expressed concern over the reported execution of 19-year-old Iranian wrestling star Saleh Mohammadi but says it cannot change a sovereign nation's laws.

news-global-soc.title: Coldplay Kiss Cam exec accuses Gwyneth Paltrow and Ryan Reynolds of fueling scandal with viral ad
news-global-soc.description: HR executive Kristin Cabot slams Gwyneth Paltrow and Ryan Reynolds for mocking her Coldplay Kiss Cam scandal in commercial, calling it hypocritical.
